query:
SELECT json(m.json) as "content!: Json<OCIManifest>",
                m.digest,
                length(m.blob) as "size!: i64"
            FROM manifest m
            INNER JOIN repo_blob_assoc rba ON rba.manifest_digest = m.digest
            WHERE rba.repo_name = $1
                AND (m.json -> 'subject' ->> 'digest') = $2
